food_subgroup: Flavoured milk drinks / iced café beverages

ontology.foodon_gap_note: No exact FoodOn term for iced pistachio-flavoured milk with chocolate drizzle; closest parent is flavoured milk food product.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A0CKP covers flavoured milk drinks as a category; no specific pistachio variant code exists.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: SNOMED CT 226365003 is the closest parent for flavoured milk; no pistachio-specific term available.

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard serving is approximately 350 ml (350 g), equivalent to a regular-sized iced beverage cup as served at Dunkin' Donuts Singapore.

nutrient_source.title: Flavored milk, whole milk, with added flavoring — USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy; supplemented with USDA Branded Food data for chocolate syrup component
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service — FoodData Central
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: No exact USDA or HPB entry for iced pistachio-flavoured milk with chocolate drizzle. Values estimated by combining: (1) USDA SR Legacy whole milk (FDC ID 1097512) as the base, (2) USDA SR Legacy chocolate syrup (FDC ID 19120) at approximately 5 g per 100 g of final beverage to account for the chocolate drizzle, and (3) pistachio flavouring syrup contribution modelled as a sugar-based flavouring syrup at approximately 8 g per 100 g. The resulting composite represents a diluted iced beverage at approximately 70% milk, 8% pistachio syrup, 5% chocolate drizzle, and 17% ice melt water. All values are estimates and should be replaced with laboratory analysis or manufacturer data when available.

gi_source.title: Milk, full-fat — GI value 40 (glucose reference); Flavoured milk drinks analogous estimate
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for iced pistachio-flavoured milk with chocolate drizzle. GI estimated at 40 based on full-fat flavoured milk entries in the University of Sydney GI Database (e.g., chocolate milk GI ~34–43, flavoured milk GI ~24–48 range). The added sugar-based pistachio syrup and chocolate drizzle slightly elevate GI above plain milk (~27–34) but the dairy matrix and fat content moderate the glycaemic response. GI 40 is a conservative mid-range estimate for a sweetened flavoured whole-milk beverage. GL per serving = (40 × 10.2 × 3.5) / 100 = 14.3.

hypertension.key_factor: Moderate sodium content (~147 mg per 350 ml serving)
hypertension.guidance: At approximately 147 mg sodium per serving, this beverage contributes modestly to daily sodium intake and is generally acceptable for hypertensive individuals when consumed occasionally, provided total daily sodium remains within the recommended limit of 2000 mg.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Added sugar from pistachio syrup and chocolate drizzle (~34 g sugar per 350 ml serving)
type2_diabetes.guidance: The added sugars from pistachio flavouring syrup and chocolate drizzle result in approximately 34 g of sugar per serving; individuals with Type 2 Diabetes should limit or avoid this beverage and opt for unsweetened milk alternatives to manage postprandial blood glucose.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Moderate saturated fat (~5.25 g per 350 ml serving) and added sugar
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: The saturated fat from whole milk and the added sugars from syrups contribute to cardiovascular risk if consumed frequently; individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit intake to occasional consumption and consider lower-fat or unsweetened alternatives.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Iced Pistachio Milk is a chilled flavoured milk beverage served at Dunkin' Donuts Singapore, consisting of cold whole milk blended with pistachio-flavoured syrup and finished with a chocolate drizzle, served over ice. The drink has a creamy, mildly nutty pistachio flavour with a sweet chocolatey finish and a smooth, cold texture. It is categorised as an ultra-processed flavoured milk drink due to the use of commercial flavouring syrups and chocolate sauce. Per 100 g, the beverage provides approximately 72 kcal, 2.8 g protein, 2.5 g fat, and 10.2 g carbohydrate, with the majority of carbohydrates coming from added sugars (~9.8 g per 100 g). A standard 350 ml serving delivers roughly 252 kcal and 34 g of sugar. The glycaemic index is estimated at 40 (low GI) based on analogous flavoured whole-milk entries in the University of Sydney GI Database, though the glycaemic load per serving is moderate at approximately 14.3 due to the serving size. Clinically, the beverage is of moderate concern for individuals with Type 2 Diabetes owing to its high added-sugar content, and of low concern for hypertension and cardiovascular disease when consumed occasionally. It contains milk and pistachio allergens and is suitable for vegetarians and halal diets. The drink is popular as a café-style indulgence beverage in Singapore's food delivery market.
common_user_queries: How many calories in Dunkin Donuts iced pistachio milk?
Is iced pistachio milk high in sugar?
What is the GI of flavoured milk drinks?

confidence_reason: No exact nutritional entry exists in any approved primary source (HPB Singapore Foodo, USDA FoodData Central, or ICMR-NIN) for iced pistachio-flavoured milk with chocolate drizzle as served at Dunkin' Donuts Singapore. Values are estimated from USDA SR Legacy whole milk and chocolate syrup components with a modelled pistachio syrup contribution. GI is an analogous estimate from flavoured milk entries in the University of Sydney GI Database. Confidence is low until manufacturer nutritional data or laboratory analysis is available.
notes: 1. Nutrient values are composite estimates derived from USDA SR Legacy whole milk (FDC ID 1097512) and USDA SR Legacy chocolate syrup (FDC ID 19120), with pistachio flavouring syrup modelled as a sugar-based syrup. These should be replaced with manufacturer-provided or laboratory-analysed values when available. 2. trans_fat_g is set to 0.0; confirmed zero or trace per USDA SR Legacy whole milk data — confirmed zero by formulation for the dairy base. 3. monounsaturated_fat_g (0.7) and polyunsaturated_fat_g (0.1) are estimated from USDA SR Legacy whole milk fatty acid profile scaled to the diluted beverage. 4. GI of 40 is an analogous estimate based on flavoured full-fat milk entries (GI range 34–48) from the University of Sydney GI Database; no direct measurement exists for this product. gi_category is 'low' per the ≤55 threshold rule. 5. Allergen information (milk, tree nuts/pistachio, may contain soy) is based on standard Dunkin' Donuts ingredient disclosures; consumers should verify with the restaurant. 6. Halal status is assumed based on Dunkin' Donuts Singapore's general halal certification; consumers should verify current certification status. 7. Serving size of 350 g is an estimate for a standard iced beverage cup; actual serving size may vary. 8. Sentinel values: monounsaturated_fat_g, polyunsaturated_fat_g, and all micronutrients are estimated from USDA SR Legacy whole milk data scaled to the composite beverage; none are set to -1 as reasonable estimates are available from the approved source. 9. The food is served by Dunkin' Donuts Funan, Singapore, sourced from field survey data delivery platform data (GD003953).
